ledger.name: v004 macro system best forex edge
ICT FVG limit entry positive EV
Quarter-end fade at scale
ledger.result: 39% WR, n=366 — small sample was noise

ledger.name: E1 rate divergence at 60-day hold
ledger.result: FALSIFIED (REST MODE 2026-05-18). 60d hold Sharpe 0.300 vs 20d hold 0.658. Longer hold hurts Sharpe despite higher avg R (0.282→0.355). Win rate collapses (38.8%→26.7%). 20-day is the better period. Side finding: 5-day consistency filter on rate signal shows positive R at 20d — worth testing in state_allocator vs single-day signal.

ledger.name: Calendar edges as v004 size boosts
ledger.result: Negligible effect (+0.0014 Sharpe). Only 30/863 trades hit calendar windows (3.5%). March JPY only pair with signal. Quarter-end barely fires.

ledger.name: ICT walk-forward stability with live paper trades
Stop width invariant to Sharpe
ledger.result: Sharpe invariant to stop width scaling. Tested across 4200 combos — hold period dominates, not stop width.

ledger.name: Library bull regime CRITICAL false positive fixed
ledger.result: GOLDILOCKS_LOW_VOL (severity=-1) top match at 0.9338 caused 0.00x size. Fix: floor 0.50x when primary is bull. Equity trading restored.

ledger.name: Pure carry direction (rate sign) works as standalone
ledger.result: FALSIFIED (REST MODE 2026-05-18). Only GBPUSD (+0.178) and AUDUSD (+0.174) positive Sharpe out of 8 pairs. USDJPY (-0.555) and EURUSD (-5.636) worst. High differential ≠ good carry trade — large adverse moves dominate. Carry works as income overlay inside v004, not as directional signal. Recommended pairs: GBPUSD, AUDUSD only.

ledger.name: March JPY seasonal persists pre-2020 (extended history)
ledger.result: FALSIFIED (REST MODE 2026-05-18). Pre-2020 (n=6): 67% WR but avg R barely negative (-0.058). Looks better than post-2020 (20% WR) but not tradeable — too few occurrences, small edge. 2022 Fed hike cycle (+6% USDJPY in March) confirmed it is permanently broken at scale. No April reversal. Archive this research line.

ledger.name: Library CRITICAL match driven by equity dislocation features
ledger.result: FALSIFIED (REST MODE 2026-05-18). SHALE_SUPPLY_OIL_CRASH primary features are actually bullish equity (above 200SMA, positive momentum) — match is commodity/macro-driven, not equity dislocation. True CRITICAL fingerprint across 26 patterns: consecutive_down_weeks (signal=2.22), sector_dispersion (1.99), realized_vol_90d (1.69). Current market matching on oil-era macro, not equity crash precursors. Bull regime floor fix was correct. Recommend: add get_feature_weights() to AlexandrianLibrary for live decomposition.

ledger.name: Fixed TP/SL outperforms trailing stop on macro-aligned entries
ledger.hypothesis: Time exits (77.3% WR) dramatically outperform trailing_stop exits (17.1% WR). 54% of UNEXPLAINED losses exit via trailing stop on macro-aligned trades. Hypothesis: replacing trailing stop with fixed TP at 3.0-4.0R and fixed SL at -1.0R removes premature exit noise and recovers a portion of the UNEXPLAINED category. Pegasus retrain on 3,983 trades independently found optimal tp_rr = 3.801, consistent with this.
ledger.test_method: Backtest v004 8-pair universe with fixed TP/SL structure. Sweep TP at 2.0R, 2.5R, 3.0R, 3.5R, 4.0R with fixed SL at 1.0R. Compare Sharpe vs current 1.024 trailing-stop baseline.

ledger.name: Per-pair hold optimization v007
ledger.hypothesis: All 5 viable pairs optimized to 5-7 day holds from 60d baseline. Expected Sharpe > 1.10.

ledger.name: NY_PM session is anti-edge (-0.283R avg)
ledger.action: NY_PM vetoed in pipeline.py stage 5.7. London-only MC pass rate: 90.3%

ledger.name: A+ grade paradox — score anti-correlated with success
ledger.result: A+ WR=13% (-0.375R avg) vs Grade A WR=39% (+0.383R avg). 30 vs 72 trades.
ledger.action: A+ downgraded to A for trade decision in pipeline stage 5.7. Still logged as A+.

ledger.name: pd_alignment component is anti-edge
ledger.action: QUEUED for testing: zero out pd_alignment weight in ICT scorer.

ledger.name: Forex UNEXPLAINED losses are not resolvable by momentum threshold
ledger.result: Momentum distributions identical between unexplained losses and wins. No clean threshold exists.
ledger.action: UNEXPLAINED category requires a third factor not currently measured.

ledger.name: London-only ICT + Grade A: the exact setup for TP2 hits
ledger.result: London Grade A (n=39): WR=41%, avgR=+0.840, Sharpe proxy=2.093. 11/17 TP2 hits.
ledger.action: This is the system target setup. Pipeline now routes toward this profile.
